summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all three retention policies, combined rules, dry-run mode, CLI, error handling, and end-to-end workflow execution via act. Well-organized with good fixtures and clear test names. Minor gaps include untested edge cases (empty artifact list, single artifact, identical timestamps, exact boundary conditions) and some hardcoded expected values. Workflow tests provide valuable integration coverage but introduce external tool dependencies (git, act, Docker) that could cause brittleness. Would catch most regressions but has room for edge case expansion.
